title: Fix missing image, update address, and enhance blurry photo

requirements.summary: Add a valid gym facility photo to fill the empty/missing picture slot in the image gallery
acceptanceCriteria: All image slots in the gallery display valid photos with no empty placeholders
The added image shows Bodyshape Fitness equipment or facilities

file_operations.description: Update the images array in ImageGallery.tsx to replace the empty/missing image slot with the generated gym facility photo at frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-fill.dim_800x600.png. Ensure all 12 image slots reference valid assets with proper alt text describing gym equipment or facilities.

requirements.summary: Update the gym address to '6424 Taylor Mill Road' across all frontend locations
acceptanceCriteria: The address '6424 Taylor Mill Road' appears on the Locations page
The address '6424 Taylor Mill Road' appears in the footer contact information
All previous address references are replaced with the correct address

file_operations.description: Update the address prop in the LocationCard component to '6424 Taylor Mill Road' while preserving the existing phone number and hours information. Ensure the updated address displays correctly in the location details section.
Update the address displayed in the footer contact information section to '6424 Taylor Mill Road'. Maintain the existing footer layout, phone number, and all other contact details.

requirements.summary: Replace the first blurry gallery image with an enhanced version
acceptanceCriteria: The first image in the gallery displays with improved clarity and sharpness
The enhanced image maintains the same subject matter (gym equipment/facilities)
The image quality is visibly improved compared to the current blurry version

file_operations.description: Replace the first image in the images array with the enhanced version at frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-1-enhanced.dim_800x600.png. Ensure the new image reference uses the correct workspace path and maintains the existing alt text and gallery functionality.
